title: Build a calendar app in AI Studio in 6 minutes
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates building a no-code calendar application using Google AI Studio and Gemini. The tutorial shows how to extract travel itineraries and convert them into calendar invitations using advanced reasoning capabilities.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building a no-code calendar application in Google AI Studio using Gemini. It demonstrates extracting travel itineraries and converting them into calendar invitations, drawing on the model's reasoning capabilities. The walkthrough touches on prompt engineering and code generation as the mechanisms behind the build, all compressed into a six-minute demo.
